text:
St Mary's Hospital 

Institute of Neurology 

Clinic Date: 02 October 2025 

Dr Patel  
St Mary's Hospital  
Institute of Neurology, St Mary's Hospital, London W2 1NY  

Dear Dr Patel,  

Hannah Morris, DOB: 12-05-1991, Hospital No: H938420 NHS No. 5839201746  
23 Alder Grove, London, W10 6QL 

Medication: 

Levetiracetam 1000 mg twice daily. Seizure cessation following initiation of last ASM. No adverse effects reported beyond initial mild fatigue that settled within two weeks. 

Today I reviewed Hannah Morris in clinic. She brought her paper seizure calendar covering the past 8 months, which she updates daily and brings to each appointment. Entries confirm Seizure cessation following initiation of last ASM, with the last marked event predating the start of levetiracetam. She has kept consistent sleep and hydration patterns as noted in her log. 

She reports reliable adherence (no missed doses recorded on the calendar) and has noted improved confidence returning to usual activities. She does not drive. There have been no episodes suggestive of auras, blackouts, or nocturnal events according to her and her partner’s observations, and there are no entries for injuries, tongue-biting, or post-ictal confusion since starting treatment. Headaches were recorded intermittently in month one but have not persisted. 

We discussed continuing the current regimen unchanged. She will maintain the paper calendar and bring it to follow-up; she prefers this format over digital apps, which she finds distracting. Bloods today (U&E, FBC, LFTs) have been arranged as a baseline for ongoing monitoring given continued therapy; results will be copied to you. 

We plan to see her again in six months, sooner if there are any breakthrough events or tolerability concerns. 

Yours sincerely

entities.text: Entries confirm Seizure cessation following initiation of last ASM, with the last marked event predating the start of levetiracetam.
Seizure cessation following initiation of last ASM

check__Seizure Frequency Number.analysis: The letter explicitly states seizure cessation after starting levetiracetam. It mentions that the patient brought an 8-month seizure calendar with entries confirming cessation since initiation, and the last event predated starting levetiracetam. This implies no seizures for the duration covered by the calendar, i.e., the past 8 months. The criterion for seizure free requires at least 6 months of no seizures; here, the information supports at least 8 months seizure freedom. Therefore, label as seizure free for multiple months (more specifically >=6 months).
seizure_frequency_number: Entries confirm Seizure cessation following initiation of last ASM, with the last marked event predating the start of levetiracetam.
reference: Seizure cessation following initiation of last ASM
